reviews.review_description: Can't read it please  fix it it will be more fun

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support, we have english version on oculus store, you may try that one, thanks for your support again.

reviews.review_description:
The graphics and game play are awesome!  Love that there's a game about Chinese vampires and ghosts and it's brilliantly executed! 

The game is in Chinese but it's pretty easy to grasp without English instructions: you pull the trigger button to fire "spell papers" and you press the round button to bring out the "wooden ritual sword". Be careful, the wooden sword expires after too many uses.

Hopefully in future, it will be able to play sound through chromecast because it's so fun to play with family. 

Also, I keep getting 0 points. Would be great if the points can tell me how many ghosts I've defeated!

Game is in cantonese ... for 1$ U can try (after seeing screenshoots i've pay almost 10$ and i admit it was really stupid choice), if U want spend more money choose something else... U will find better ghost/undead shooter using samsung controller in oculus store for free.

This is an awesome game, especially if your a Mr Vampire movie fan! Waited decades for a Chinese vampire game and it's even on VR - how awesome! 😱 Gameplay wise it's fun and a good workout. You might find it a little limited/short, but for the genre and atmosphere (scary at first) it's spot on! Hope they make a bigger sequel and expand on it in the future! What a blast!👻
Want to get the Rift version too now, but for some reason it doesn't allow me buy it in the store, if the developers see this message I hope they will sort it out! 😌🙏

reviews.review_title: I bought this game ...I love the movies
reviews.review_description: I thought it would be in English bit hard to understand if you don't know which. ...Language. .However the game fully embraces the franchise. ..Here's Johnny
The game is fun, but the sense is little too dark, hard to see. If the game have subtitles would be great. The shooting speed is little too slow as well.￼
